_comment: MOCKUP — Réponse B2B GET /api/v1/insights/latest?asset=XAUUSD&timeframe=M15. Toutes les sections du contrat InsightSignal sont exposées. Aucun champ tronqué — c'est l'intérêt B2B (audit + transparence broker).
narrative_short: Bullish structure break on M15 with FVG retest at 2378-2381. HMM trend_bullish regime, volatility +18% vs ATR14. NY session, no news blackout.
narrative_full: Smart Money structure on XAU/USD M15 has shifted bullish following a confirmed Break of Structure above the 2391.5 swing high. Price has subsequently retested the Fair Value Gap formed between 2378.00 and 2381.00, where institutional liquidity is most likely to be defended. The Hidden Markov Model classifies the current regime as trend_bullish (posterior probability 0.71), and the LightGBM volatility forecaster anticipates +18% versus the 14-period ATR — a moderate expansion consistent with NY-session activity. The structural invalidation sits at 2374.50, below the FVG floor; a clean break of this level would invalidate the bullish read and force re-evaluation. Immediate target zone is the resistance band 2398.50-2401.20, with extension to 2412.00 if volume supports continuation. No high-impact news blackout is currently active. This is an algorithmic market analysis, not a trading recommendation.
